title: Uglified
description: A resource pack that have ugly Minecraft texture
body:
## About
The Uglified resource pack is a modified version of Minecraft's default textures to make them look ugly. Every Minecraft texture has been run through a custom script that uglifies the textures.

The script used to create this resource pack is in this GitHub repository: https://github.com/AndEditor7/UglifierScript

If you want to automatically uglify the textures in runtime, including the modded and resource packs, you can use this Minecraft mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/uglifier

## Why It Exists
There is a phenomenon that occurs when you use terrible textures and then remove them after playing for a while; the Minecraft textures will look clear and crisp. Useful if you need to get readjusted to Minecraft's default texture after playing too much high-definition block game like Hytale or Vintage Story.
